scores.justification: Agent successfully identified Sarah Chen as u042 via case-insensitive search (`./cli/bin/ctl search --query "Sarah" --scope users --i`), which returned the exact user record with id u042, email sarah.chen@acme.io, and name Sarah Chen.

Agent retrieved ticket t019 via `./cli/bin/ctl get tickets t019 --format json` (confirming escalated status and critical priority) and user record u042 via `./cli/bin/ctl get users u042 --format json` (showing status=suspended and status_changed_at=2026-04-22T11:47:00Z), both explicitly documented in the final summary.

Agent retrieved all three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) via `jq '[.[] | select(.user_id=="u042" and .flagged==true)]' /tmp/all_orders.json` and included them in the investigation summary with their amounts, dates, and flagged status.

The final summary coherently connects Sarah Chen (u042) → automatic account suspension on 2026-04-22 → three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) placed over the weekend → escalated ticket t019 → root cause (billing-anomaly detector triggered by high-value multi-currency orders) → impact (customer blocked from checkout), forming a unified narrative rather than a disjointed list.
